title: AshiMons [cobblemon]
description: Added some pokemon modeled by myself.
body:
Added some pokemon that I modeled myself for cobblemon (it won't contain fakemon\
I'm not a professional modeler, so it may update slowly:)\
I hope you will like it and have fun:)\
If you want to use it on server /modpack, please contact me on discord! Don't worry, this is just to let me know, I don't want them to have to pay to get them
(discord-support:[https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1248208030525558848](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1248208030525558848))
